title: Even More Magic
description: Become a wizard! 90 upgradable magic wands, 260+ curio baubles with 3D models, 170+ structures and much more magical stuff xD
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ad3d02a970bcfd5a66bd0fe864ec04fea4aaefa.png)
## Trailer
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kxcVQtQiOug" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HKZjBbeTQAc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features 

- 90 upgradable magic wands (273 wands in total)
- immersive GUI-less wand crafting
- 260+ curio baubles with 3D models to enchance your spell power and fancy looks
- 160 small ruins and 18 special structures - all of them have chests with magical loot
- 10 custom mobs guarding the magical treasure
- 11 sets of wizard robes
- 25 spell scrolls
- 15 magical swords
- Wizard Elementary - a complete in-game tutorial with a questline
- high configurability - you can disable each wand, each scroll and each mob
- the structures contain a bunch of decorative blocks designed to fit in your wizard dwelling
- the mod supports [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- the mod supports [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- full compatibility with numerous biome mods (list [here](https://evenmoremagic.net/index.php/compatibility/))

## Wiki

🚧 Under renovation — adding upcoming update content — wiki temporarily unavailable 🚧

## Requirements

- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## Configuration
### Config File

In the config file you can:

- disable any wand
- disable any scroll
- disable any monster
- disable giving player the Wizard Elementary on joining the world
- disable quest completion toasts

### Structure generation

For less common structure generation try the less common structures edition of the mod:

- [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/even-more-magic-less-common-structures-edition
](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/even-more-magic-less-common-structures-edition
)

Yeah, you can use it in your modpack! 😇
